name: open-tabletop-engine
description: API-first virtual tabletop engine with permissioned plugins and AI assistance.

scripts.release:smoke: node scripts/run-package-scripts.mjs v1:worktree:check security:audit check e2e security:smoke migration:smoke deployment:smoke perf:smoke perf:soak perf:capacity docs:site:test docs:site:check sbom:test v1:evidence:test v1:issues:test v1:issues:check
scripts.identity:smoke: node scripts/run-package-manager.mjs --filter @open-tabletop/api exec vitest run src/identity-smoke.test.ts
scripts.migration:smoke: node scripts/run-package-manager.mjs --filter @open-tabletop/api exec vitest run src/migration-smoke.test.ts -t "migration smoke"
scripts.deployment:smoke: node scripts/run-package-manager.mjs --filter @open-tabletop/api exec vitest run src/deployment-smoke.test.ts
scripts.perf:smoke: node scripts/run-package-manager.mjs --filter @open-tabletop/api exec vitest run src/performance-smoke.test.ts -t "performance smoke"
scripts.perf:soak: node scripts/run-package-manager.mjs --filter @open-tabletop/api exec vitest run src/performance-smoke.test.ts -t "performance soak"
scripts.security:smoke: node scripts/run-package-manager.mjs --filter @open-tabletop/api exec vitest run src/security-smoke.test.ts
scripts.check: node scripts/run-package-scripts.mjs lint typecheck e2e:typecheck test build
